pr.title: GrTMars conversion to C and matching of basic functions
pr.author: PsiLupan

summary: Converted the Marth target-test stage module from assembly path asm/melee/gr/grtmars.s to C path src/melee/gr/grtmars.c, matching a set of basic trivial and wrapper functions while leaving larger routines as inline assembly. The PR added a local grtmars.h header, switched obj_files.mk to build grtmars from src instead of asm, and added src/melee/gr/ to Makefile include paths. It also exposed several previously unknown functions in include/functions.h as void prototypes and loosened some GX prototype signatures to unspecified arguments, apparently to satisfy calls from the new C/inline-asm translation. There were no review comments or PR body text in the provided slice, so intent beyond the title and diff is inferred only from code changes.
what_changed: Renamed asm/melee/gr/grtmars.s into src/melee/gr/grtmars.c and began compiling it as C.

Replaced fully raw assembly for several simple routines with C implementations, including no-op return functions and small integer-return functions such as GrTMars_80221EF4, GrTMars_80221F68, GrTMars_80221F90, GrTMars_802220AC, GrTMars_802220B4, GrTMars_802220B8, GrTMars_8022210C, GrTMars_80222148, GrTMars_8022219C, GrTMars_802221C4, GrTMars_802221C8, and GrTMars_802221D0.

Converted small wrapper functions to C with peephole enabled, including GrTMars_80221F6C calling func_801CAE04(0), GrTMars_80222114 calling func_800115F4() then func_801C2FE0(gobj), and GrTMars_802221A4 calling func_801C2FE0(gobj).

Kept more complex routines as inline assembly inside C functions using asm declarations and nofralloc, including GrTMars_80221EF8, GrTMars_80221F98, GrTMars_80222080, GrTMars_802220BC, and GrTMars_8022214C.
Renamed local labels/function names from generic func_80221xxx style to GrTMars_80221xxx style and updated internal branch targets accordingly.
Added src/melee/gr/grtmars.h with prototypes for the converted GrTMars functions and included dolphin/types.h, functions.h, and sysdolphin/baselib/gobj.h.
Updated obj_files.mk so grtmars.o is built from $(BUILD_DIR)/src/melee/gr/grtmars.o instead of $(BUILD_DIR)/asm/melee/gr/grtmars.o.
Updated Makefile INCLUDES to add src/melee/gr/.

Changed include/functions.h entries for several external calls from unknown commented declarations to bare void prototypes, including func_801C14D0, func_801C2ED0, func_801C39C0, func_801C3BB4, func_801C4210, func_801C42AC, func_801C5DB0, func_801C8138, OSReport, func_8038FD54, and func_8039069C.

Adjusted GXSetChanAmbColor, GXSetChanMatColor, and GXSetChanCtrl declarations from typed parameter lists to unspecified-argument void prototypes while retaining explanatory comments with the intended typed signatures.
smart_moves: Used a hybrid conversion strategy: match simple leaf functions and wrappers in C first while preserving harder routines as inline assembly, allowing the file to move into src without requiring complete C reconstruction.
Added a dedicated grtmars.h header at the same time as the C conversion, establishing prototypes and HSD_GObj usage for future work on this stage module.
Used #pragma push / #pragma peephole on / #pragma pop around small wrapper functions, indicating attention to compiler codegen needed for matching short call sequences.
Preserved original instruction comments and addresses in inline assembly blocks, keeping the converted file traceable to the original disassembly.
Updated build configuration in both obj_files.mk and Makefile, preventing the common partial-conversion mistake where a file is moved to src but still built from asm or lacks the right include path.
decomp_lessons: For stage target modules, a useful incremental path is to convert trivial blr functions, constant-return functions, and simple call-through wrappers first, then leave complex routines as asm void or typed asm functions until their data structures are better understood.
When moving a gr module into src/melee/gr, add the directory to the compiler include paths if local headers are included by basename.
Internal branch labels inside inline assembly must be updated from old generic symbol names to the new file-prefixed names once the functions are renamed.

Bare prototypes in functions.h can unblock C compilation, but they are weaker than typed signatures; later cleanup should replace void unspecified-argument declarations with accurate parameter and return types when evidence is available.
Small wrapper functions may require peephole pragma control to reproduce the original instruction sequence.
naming_conventions: Converted functions in this file use the stage/file prefix plus address format: GrTMars_80221EF4, GrTMars_80221F98, GrTMars_802221D0.
Header guard used lowercase file naming with surrounding underscores: _grtmars_h_.
Generic placeholder parameters are retained where semantics are unknown, for example param_1 in HSD_GObj* GrTMars_80221F98(int param_1).
GObj arguments are named gobj in prototypes and definitions when the type is known as HSD_GObj*.
assembly_or_matching_tactics: Used inline assembly functions with nofralloc to preserve exact stack frame and register behavior for nontrivial routines.
Matched no-op functions directly as C return; bodies.
Matched constant-return leaf functions as int functions returning 0 or 1.
Wrapped small call sequences in C and enabled peephole optimization locally to match original codegen.
Kept larger routines' original assembly comments and address annotations inside the C file for verification and future decomp progress.
Changed internal branch instructions in inline asm from func_80221F98 to GrTMars_80221F98 after symbol renaming.
follow_up_queries: Look for later PRs that replace the inline asm GrTMars_80221F98, GrTMars_80222080, GrTMars_802220BC, or GrTMars_8022214C with full C.
Search for later cleanup of bare void prototypes added in include/functions.h by this PR, especially GXSetChanAmbColor, GXSetChanMatColor, GXSetChanCtrl, OSReport, func_8038FD54, and func_8039069C.
Check whether later gr module conversions reuse the GrT<character>_<address> naming pattern and hybrid inline-asm migration approach.
Investigate whether grtmars.h header guard style _grtmars_h_ was later normalized to project header conventions.
